docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: NO ANSWER AT THE TIME OF SERVICE. THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF REESE, BARRETT BENT, ERIKA AS TO DEFENDANT ROY, NEELA

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF REESE, BARRETT BENT, ERIKA AS TO DEFENDANT ROY, RUPASREE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,743.95 FILED BY REESE, BARRETT BENT, ERIKA AS TO DEFENDANT ROY, NEELA J. WAVRO ROY, RUPASREE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 SERVED MAR-10-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT J. WAVRO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-27-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROY, RUPASREE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-27-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROY, NEELA
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY REESE, BARRETT BENT, ERIKA ROY, NEELA J. WAVRO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE. PARTIES SETTLED THEIR CASE AMICABLY IN COURT. DEFENDANT PAID DEFENDANTT IN CASH. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BARRETT REESE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS NEELA ROY AND J. WAVRO ARE PRESENT; DEFENDANT RUPASREE ROY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
